name: Code Implementation
description: Implement code changes with focused file edits and runnable verification instructions.

instructions: Implement concrete code changes directly in the repository.
Avoid unrelated refactors and preserve existing behavior outside the target scope.
Include focused verification steps that prove the requested behavior.
expectedArtifacts: Code changes that satisfy the delegated goal.
acceptanceCriteria: Requested behavior is implemented and validated.
Changed files remain consistent with repository coding constraints.
